title: Pärnu, Pärnu County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pärnu, Pärnu County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pärnu is a city in Pärnu County with a population of 40,700. Estonia’s summer capital, a beautiful Baltic resort with long sandy beaches, a historic spa culture, a charming old town, and a vibrant summer festival scene.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
